ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude for geographic mapping */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude for geographic mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "who_regions" (
  "who_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WHO region */,
  "who_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the WHO region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO region code */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the WHO headquarters for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the regional office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("who_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flu_regions" (
  "flu_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flu region */,
  "flu_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the flu region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO region code */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the flu region office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the flu region office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flu_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_data" (
  "influenza_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influenza data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country reporting the data */,
  "who_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WHO region */,
  "flu_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flu region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was reported */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the data was reported */,
  "sdate" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "edate" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "spec_received_nb" INTEGER /* Number of specimens received */,
  "spec_processed_nb" INTEGER /* Number of specimens processed */,
  "ah1" INTEGER /* Number of AH1 cases */,
  "ah1n12009" REAL /* Number of AH1N12009 cases */,
  "ah3" INTEGER /* Number of AH3 cases */,
  "ah5" INTEGER /* Number of AH5 cases */,
  "anotsubtyped" INTEGER /* Number of untyped cases */,
  "inf_a" INTEGER /* Number of INF_A cases */,
  "byamagata" REAL /* Number of BYAMAGATA cases */,
  "bvictoria" REAL /* Number of BVICTORIA cases */,
  "bnotdetermined" INTEGER /* Number of BNOTDETERMINED cases */,
  "inf_b" INTEGER /* Number of INF_B cases */,
  "all_inf" INTEGER /* Total number of influenza cases */,
  "all_inf2" INTEGER /* Total number of influenza cases (alternative count) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for the reporting period */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations for the reporting period */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths for the reporting period */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Vaccination coverage percentage for the population */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influenza_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_flu_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("flu_region_id") REFERENCES flu_regions ("flu_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_who_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("who_region_id") REFERENCES who_regions ("who_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_group_range" TEXT /* Age range in a more detailed format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_cases" (
  "influenza_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influenza case */,
  "influenza_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "date_of_onset" TEXT /* Date of onset of symptoms */,
  "date_of_hospitalization" TEXT /* Date of hospitalization */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* List of underlying medical conditions */,
  "contact_tracing" TEXT /* Status of contact tracing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influenza_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_cases_influenza_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("influenza_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_cases_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_data" (
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory data entry */,
  "influenza_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza data entry */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "date_of_test" TEXT /* Date the laboratory test was performed */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "lab_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the laboratory */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_data_influenza_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("influenza_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization data entry */,
  "influenza_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza case */,
  "date_of_hospitalization" TEXT /* Date the patient was hospitalized */,
  "date_of_discharge" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the hospitalization */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "hospital_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the hospital */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for hospitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_influenza_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_case_id") REFERENCES influenza_cases ("influenza_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data entry */,
  "influenza_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza case */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date the patient died */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the patient died */,
  "hospital_location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "hospital_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the hospital */,
  "postmortem_findings" TEXT /* Postmortem findings or autopsy results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_influenza_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_case_id") REFERENCES influenza_cases ("influenza_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "influenza_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza data entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_creator" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_influenza_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("influenza_id")
)
